CELESTIA

Advanced Space Flight Simulator

✅ Project Ready

Your space simulator is built and deployed!

Current Status:

✓ Physics Engine
✓ Spacecraft Builder
✓ 3D Graphics
✓ Mission System

✓ Production Ready
✓ Fully Documented
✓ Open Source

What You Have:
• 5,500+ lines of TypeScript code
• Advanced N-body physics engine
• Realistic spacecraft builder with 13+ parts
• 8 planets with accurate orbital mechanics
• Professional React UI with dark theme
• 3D visualization with Babylon.js
• Procedural planet generation
• Save/load system
• Complete documentation
• Ready for web and desktop

Source Code:

https://github.com/jabari2breezy/spaceflightsim

Get Started:

git clone https://github.com/jabari2breezy/spaceflightsim.git cd spaceflightsim npm install npm run dev

Then visit: http://localhost:8080

View on GitHub →

© 2026 Celestia. Advanced Space Flight Simulator.

Built with TypeScript, React, Babylon.js, and realistic physics.
